subject: Create logit comparison test case
description:
Add test case to t/t_generate_ingest_1.cpp or create new test file for ChatGLM2-6B. Test should:
1. Load test tokens by hash
2. Generate logits from Tron using force_generate
3. Compare against golden logits using check_golden_logits
4. Use appropriate TVD tolerance (start with 0.03-0.05)
